assertions.text: [rubric-1] Includes a "what exists" section identifying current code
assertions.evidence: The response includes a clear 'What Exists' section that identifies the current state of models, services, utils, and entry points (CLI/API) regarding the task priority functionality.

assertions.text: [rubric-2] Includes a "what needs to change" section
assertions.evidence: The response includes a 'What Needs to Change' section listing specific modifications required in six different areas of the codebase.

assertions.text: [rubric-3] Lists all consumers of affected interfaces
assertions.evidence: The response includes an 'All Consumers of Shared Interfaces' section, specifically tracking the usage of the Task interface, formatTask function, and derivePriority function across the project.

assertions.text: [rubric-4] Identifies risks (backward compatibility, multiple entry points)
assertions.evidence: The response identifies risks including backward compatibility (breaking changes to the Task interface), lack of tests, and the requirement to handle multiple entry points (CLI and API).
